steps.title: 重写 DEV_DOCS_GUIDELINES 字符串（剔专属 + 保留方法论 + 泛化路径）
steps.verify: grep 命中所有关键短语；grep 不命中专属字面（除非括号举例）；tsc 通过

steps.title: 重写 ISSUES_ARCHIVE_SECTION 与新 DEV_DOCS_GUIDELINES 内嵌段一致
steps.verify: 两份 Issues 档案段 diff 一致

steps.title: 跑 pnpm -C packages/server exec tsc -b 类型检查
steps.verify: 退出码 0，无新增类型错误

steps.title: 关闭 .aimon/docs/team-agent-harness-dev-docs-workflow.md:346 老 TODO（追加 ✅ 后缀）
steps.verify: grep 该行命中且含 ✅ 标记

steps.title: self-test diff 校验：贴 git diff --name-only HEAD 到 tasks.md 末尾
steps.verify: tasks.md 末尾能看到真实 diff 输出，所有路径在白名单内
write_files: dev/active/工作流模板同步/工作流模板同步-tasks.md

steps.title: 交付 handoff 摘要
steps.verify: ≤10 行白话摘要，含 git diff 输出，第一行验收指引
